title: Efforts On To Bring Captured/Tamed Elephants To Centuries Old K.Gudi /Budipadaga Camps
description: Ruling out shutting down the camps in BRT, a senior official of Biligiriranganatha Swamy Temple tiger reserve told Deccan Chronicle on Wednesday “Efforts will be made to get tamed/captured elephants to K.Gudi and draw the attention of the State Government.
